result.answer_text: I found the Quran passage, but I do not have enough approved tafsir evidence to explain it reliably.

quran_support.arabic_text: الم ذَٰلِكَ الْكِتَابُ لَا رَيْبَ ۛ فِيهِ ۛ هُدًى لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ الَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِالْغَيْبِ وَيُقِيمُونَ الصَّلَاةَ وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنَاهُمْ يُنفِقُونَ وَالَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِمَا أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ وَمَا أُنزِلَ مِن قَبْلِكَ وَبِالْآخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ أُولَـٰئِكَ عَلَىٰ هُدًى مِّن رَّبِّهِمْ ۖ وَأُولَـٰئِكَ هُمُ الْمُفْلِحُونَ
quran_support.translation_text: Alif. Lam. Mim. This is the Book of Allah: there is no doubt about it. It is guidance to Godfearing people, who believe in the unseen, establish the Salats and expend (in Our way) out of what We have bestowed on them; who believe in the Book We have sent down to you (i.e. the Qur'an) and in the Books sent down before you, and firmly believe in the Hereafter. Such people are on the right way from their Lord and such are truly successful.

warnings: Tafsir retrieval failed for tafsir:ibn-kathir-en; returned without that Tafsir support. Cause: No database URL configured. Set DALIL_DATABASE_URL or DATABASE_URL before running tafsir ingestion.

parent_turn_id.notes: Accepted and surfaced for follow-up support. Parent-turn hydration is available when the caller supplies a prior turn id emitted by the conversation surface.

limit.notes: Used only when Tafsir retrieval is eligible and selected for the request.

source_ids.notes: Current public contract supports up to three Tafsir source ids for source-separated comparative Quran commentary selection.

mode.notes: Current public contract supports bounded explicit Hadith lookup/explain lanes and bounded topical Hadith retrieval. This mode is enforced within that public bounded scope; unrestricted multi-source Hadith answering remains unsupported.

collection_ids.notes: Current public contract supports at most one Hadith collection id; multi-collection selection is deferred.

quran_span.arabic_text: الم ذَٰلِكَ الْكِتَابُ لَا رَيْبَ ۛ فِيهِ ۛ هُدًى لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ الَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِالْغَيْبِ وَيُقِيمُونَ الصَّلَاةَ وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنَاهُمْ يُنفِقُونَ وَالَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِمَا أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ وَمَا أُنزِلَ مِن قَبْلِكَ وَبِالْآخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ أُولَـٰئِكَ عَلَىٰ هُدًى مِّن رَّبِّهِمْ ۖ وَأُولَـٰئِكَ هُمُ الْمُفْلِحُونَ

translation.text: Alif. Lam. Mim. This is the Book of Allah: there is no doubt about it. It is guidance to Godfearing people, who believe in the unseen, establish the Salats and expend (in Our way) out of what We have bestowed on them; who believe in the Book We have sent down to you (i.e. the Qur'an) and in the Books sent down before you, and firmly believe in the Hereafter. Such people are on the right way from their Lord and such are truly successful.

ayah_rows.arabic_text: ذَٰلِكَ الْكِتَابُ لَا رَيْبَ ۛ فِيهِ ۛ هُدًى لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
ayah_rows.translation_text: This is the Book of Allah: there is no doubt about it. It is guidance to Godfearing people,

ayah_rows.arabic_text: الَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِالْغَيْبِ وَيُقِيمُونَ الصَّلَاةَ وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنَاهُمْ يُنفِقُونَ
ayah_rows.translation_text: who believe in the unseen, establish the Salats and expend (in Our way) out of what We have bestowed on them;

ayah_rows.arabic_text: وَالَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِمَا أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ وَمَا أُنزِلَ مِن قَبْلِكَ وَبِالْآخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ
ayah_rows.translation_text: who believe in the Book We have sent down to you (i.e. the Qur'an) and in the Books sent down before you, and firmly believe in the Hereafter.

ayah_rows.arabic_text: أُولَـٰئِكَ عَلَىٰ هُدًى مِّن رَّبِّهِمْ ۖ وَأُولَـٰئِكَ هُمُ الْمُفْلِحُونَ
ayah_rows.translation_text: Such people are on the right way from their Lord and such are truly successful.
